title: Morphic Grove
description:
You enter a grove of [green]crystalline trees[/green], and they begin to [jitter]quiver excitedly[/jitter]!
A chorus of [sine]hellos and welcomes[/sine] bombard you as a group of [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] [jitter]burst[/jitter] forth from trees.

One of the [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?
conditions: At least 2 transformable cards in deck
notes: The [gold]Group[/gold] option causes you to lose ALL gold (stolen by the Morphics), then select [blue]2[/blue] cards from your deck to [gold]Transform[/gold] into random cards. In multiplayer, all players lose their gold. The [green]Loner[/green] option grants [green]5[/green] Max HP.
